allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=Fraud psql -U frauduser -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE farm_pos;" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'Farm POS Dev' -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 5000 -Action Allow" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''''name'''']\) for i in data]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Version:'''', data[''''tag_name'''']\); print\(''''\\nAssets:''''\); [print\(f  - {a[''''name'''']}\) for a in data.get\(''''assets'''', []\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; [print\(i[''''name'''']\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if i[''''name''''].endswith\(''''.py''''\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f#{i[''''number'''']}: {i[''''title'''']} [{i[''''state'''']}] - Comments: {i[''''comments'''']}\) for i in data[:20]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {p['stock_level']} {p['base_unit']} — R{p.get\('batches',[{}]\)[0].get\('cost_per_base_unit','?'\)}/{p['base_unit']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {p['stock_level']} {p['base_unit']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {p['stock_level']}{p['base_unit']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p['name']=='Biltong']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"#{d['id'][:8]} total=R{d['total']} COGS={d.get\('cogs'\)} margin={d.get\('margin_pct'\)}%\\"\) for d in data]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"#{d['id'][:8]} R{d['total']} COGS={d.get\('cogs'\)} margin={d.get\('margin_pct'\)}%\\"\) for d in data[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['id']} {p['name']} \({p['product_type']}\) R{p['price']} parent={p['parent_stock_item_id']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{r['adjustment_type']} | {r['product_name']} | {r['qty_change_base']}{r['base_unit']} | cost={r['cost_written_off']} | {r['reason']}\\"\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: pkg_size={p['package_size']} \({p['package_size_unit']}\) low_stock={p['low_stock_threshold']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'Test' in p['name']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {p['stock_level']}{p['base_unit']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'Test' in p['name']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {[f\\\\\\"{b['qty_remaining_base']}{b.get\('supplier_name','?'\)}\\\\\\"+'' for b in p['batches']]}\\"\) for p in data if p['name'] in ['Full Cream Milk','Biltong']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: is_for_sale={p['is_for_sale']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p['name']=='Apples']")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: sold_by_weight={p['sold_by_weight']} price={p['price']} price_per_unit={p['price_per_unit']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p['name']=='Biltong']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: margin={p['margin_pct']}%\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p['name']=='Cappuccino Medium']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"flagged={d['flagged']} note={d['flag_note']}\\"\) for d in data if d.get\('flagged'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"flagged={d['flagged']} resolved={d['flag_resolved']} note={d['flag_note']}\\"\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if d.get\('flagged'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: is_prepared={p['is_prepared']}\\"\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if p['name']=='Cappuccino Medium']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"#{o['id']} qty={o['qty']} sort={o['sort_order']}\\"\) for o in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"id={o['id']} qty={int\(o['qty']\)} sort={o['sort_order']}\\"\) for o in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
